single.reason: Single-event page renders in the same responsive grid as the populated state; the load-bearing boundary here is empty vs populated, both covered.

many.reason: Events grid wraps responsively with no truncation or pagination; more events only add rows, not a distinct visual state.

loading.reason: Fully static (statically-exported) page with content collections resolved at build; no async/loading state.

edge.reason: Optional-field branches (an event with no link) are exercised within the typical scenario; no distinct edge layout.

error.reason: Static content page with no data fetching; no failure/error state can occur.

key-interaction.reason: Primary actions are outbound links (Subscribe, Volunteer, View Events, mailto); no in-page interactive state to capture.
